column4: The refund was processed quickly and the staff was very helpful. Great experience despite the cancellation.
The duplicate charge was sorted out promptly. Docking one star because it should not have happened in the first place.
Not only did they refund me, they also gave me a complimentary credit. Excellent customer service!
The staff sorted out my wrong booking immediately and even helped me get the right seats. Really impressed.
Issue was fixed quickly. The staff walked me through every step patiently.
The workaround helped but I am disappointed the app had such a basic issue. Response was good though.
Took a bit longer than expected to fix but the staff kept me informed throughout. Seats were held which I appreciated.
Resolved quickly once I gave the order number. Staff was professional and reassuring.
The double booking was a serious error but it was handled very professionally and quickly. Very satisfied with the resolution.
Got an even better seat than I hoped for. Staff went above and beyond to find me a great spot in the Orchestra section.
Quick and easy reschedule with no fuss and no extra charge. Exactly what good service looks like.
Got all the information I needed about group discounts and was connected to the right team. Very helpful.
